scripts.dist: shx rm -rf ./dist && dotnet build -c Release ./SimpleVCLib/SimpleVCLib.csproj && shx mkdir -p ./dist && shx cp ./SimpleVCLib/bin/Release/net8.0/SimpleVCLib.dll ./dist && shx cp ../README.md ./dist && shx cp ../LICENSE ./dist
scripts.pack: npm run dist && shx mkdir -p ../dist/v$npm_package_version && shx rm -rf ../dist/v$npm_package_version/$npm_package_name-v$npm_package_version.zip && zip -r ../dist/v$npm_package_version/$npm_package_name-v$npm_package_version.zip ./dist
scripts.publish-nuget: dotnet pack -c Release ./SimpleVCLib/SimpleVCLib.csproj -o ./nupkg && dotnet nuget push ./nupkg/*.nupkg --api-key $NUGET_API_KEY --source https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json --skip-duplicate
